reasoning: Order is marked Complete, but payment method is Check/Money Order and Total Paid is $0.00, indicating no payment was received. Additionally, there is no visible shipment or delivery confirmation on the order view to validate fulfillment. Since the customer claims non-receipt and payment was never captured, this requires investigation (check shipments tab, carrier tracking, and payment records) before issuing a refund. Escalating to finance/fulfillment for verification is appropriate.
